source_meta.source_document: Triathlon TS Knee System Surgical protocol

systems.system_notes: Semi-constrained revision knee platform anchored to the official Stryker Triathlon TS revision page and surgical protocol.

trays.tray_notes: Official Triathlon TS revision materials support dedicated reamer-based revision instrumentation and component preparation workflow.

components.component_notes: Official Triathlon TS materials describe the total stabilizer femoral component as the core revision femoral implant.
Official Triathlon TS materials describe the revision baseplate that extends the construct into revision workflows.
Official Triathlon TS materials describe the TS insert X3 as the constrained polyethylene bearing option.
The official surgical protocol lists Triathlon femoral distal augment options and catalog codes.

products.product_notes: Catalog code explicitly listed in the official Triathlon TS surgical protocol PDF.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The surgical protocol exposes multiple Triathlon TS augment and revision component catalog codes, but this pass only captures one representative coded product row.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper product-code pass is still needed to expand the full Triathlon TS revision component matrix.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction adds one reliable coded product without expanding every size and augment variation yet.
